headline: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE® CHRISTENS THE STUNNING NORWEGIAN LUNA™ - THE NEWEST SHIP TO SAIL TO THE CARIBBEAN AND THE BAHAMAS FROM MIAMI
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line® (NCL), the innovator in global cruise travel, celebrated the christening of Norwegian Luna™ in Miami on March 27, 2026. As the latest ship in the Company's fleet, Norwegian Luna offers a wide range of onboard experiences for every type of traveler and be the newest ship to call to the Caribbean with itineraries that visit both of NCL's resort-style destinations, Great Stirrup Cay in the Bahamas and Harvest Caye in Belize.

content.title: NORWEGIAN CRUISE LINE® CHRISTENS THE STUNNING NORWEGIAN LUNA™ - THE NEWEST SHIP TO SAIL TO THE CARIBBEAN AND THE BAHAMAS FROM MIAMI
content.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line® (NCL), the innovator in global cruise travel, celebrated the christening of Norwegian Luna™ in Miami on March 27, 2026. As the latest ship in the Company's fleet, Norwegian Luna offers a wide range of onboard experiences for every type of traveler and be the newest ship to call to the Caribbean with itineraries that visit both of NCL's resort-style destinations, Great Stirrup Cay in the Bahamas and Harvest Caye in Belize.

thumbnail.caption: The all-new Norwegian Luna™ arrives at her new homeport of Miami, the 'Cruise Capital of the World,' and offers seven-day round-trip Caribbean cruises to the Company's resort-style destinations, Great Stirrup Cay in the Bahamas and Harvest Caye in Belize.
